title: Translation Manifest Frontmatter
description: The frontmatter fields a translation file MUST carry for the dual-validation pipeline to operate. May coexist with arbitrary additional frontmatter fields from the source.

source_hash.description: SHA-256 (or truncated SHA-256) of the source body the translation was produced against. Used by the staleness detector to flag translations when source has drifted.

para_hashes.description: Per-block hash array enabling smart-translate incremental updates. The Nth entry corresponds to the Nth markdown block of the source. When a block hash differs from the stored value, only that block is re-translated.

language.description: BCP 47 short-form language code of this translation.

translated_by.description: Provider identifier — 'deepl', 'groq-llama-3.3-70b-versatile', 'claude-haiku-via-agent', 'claude-sonnet-cli', or other. Enables per-provider recovery routing on re-translation.

translated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the translation pass.

translation_provenance.description: Optional provenance trail across multi-stage pipelines (e.g., DeepL for body, sanctioned-pre-pass for glossary terms, recovery script for residuals).
